expected.notes: F-1 student is working without CPT authorization on I-20, triggering critical unauthorized employment violation.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'no_cpt_on_i20'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.has_employment eq yes
  - answers.has_cpt_authorization eq no
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
